posts.author: Flaviomian (Flavio Mian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello community

I’d like to ask an feature that it’s quite simple.

When I use “DATE” column on my automation to send a notification, the Standard format is Month, Date, Year.

It always return this way and it’s always in English.

I guess the date column could have more formats as well…
For my country, the standrd format is DD/MM/YYYY - (25/12/2024 i.e.)

In my company we also use the IATA standard for Dates wich is DDMMM - (25DEC i.e.) - It’s an standard format for the tourism industry, would be nice to be able to configure the way that we are used to work.
